description: Install dependencies and verify baseline build compiles successfully before making design changes.
steps: Run npm install in /projects/sandbox/Si-Admin to ensure all dependencies are present
Run npm run build to verify the project compiles without errors (it will likely fail on Prisma client generation since no DB - but TypeScript/Next.js compilation should be checkable via npm run lint)
Run npm run lint to confirm no pre-existing lint errors
Document any build issues as known constraints
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint passes or any failures are documented as pre-existing
verification: npm run lint exits with code 0 or documents pre-existing issues
findings: 1. npm install succeeds (589 packages, 2 moderate vulnerabilities). 2. Next.js 16 removed `next lint` command - created eslint.config.mjs and updated lint script to use eslint directly. 3. npm run build succeeds fully (all routes compile). 4. npm run lint reports 19 pre-existing issues (17 errors, 2 warnings) - all are react-hooks/immutability, react-hooks/set-state-in-effect, and react-hooks/exhaustive-deps violations in existing components. These are pre-existing and not blocking.
